title: 5 disciplines that build a man before 30
caption:
God doesn't build a man in the spotlight. He builds him in private.

The early morning nobody saw. The rep you didn't skip. The chapter you read when it would have been easier to scroll.

Your 20s are the building site. What gets built here is the man you carry into your marriage, your calling, your family, your faith.

These 5 disciplines make the difference between the man you drift into and the man you choose to become.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #discipline #christianity #scripture
